caribbean.headline: Martinique Heavy Rain with SE Swell
caribbean.paragraph: Martinique is experiencing southerly winds around 12 kt with seas near 2.3 ft and a 7 s southeast swell, and 100% rain probability affecting port operations. I recommend limiting small-boat movements in Martinique and advising operators at St. Maarten, where winds reach 18 kt, to expect reduced visibility and brief heavy downpours.

mediterranean.headline: Choppy Seas, Showers Focus on Dubrovnik and Mykonos
mediterranean.paragraph: Dubrovnik is experiencing WNW winds to 20 kt with seas to 3.6 ft and a 5 s WNW swell, and a 38% rain probability. I will monitor Mykonos where winds to 21 kt and the short 5 s seas will keep conditions choppy and could impact small-craft operations.
